decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id 'project_first-second-ave-sbs-cac3' already exists in the registry with a matching payload (same project_name, project_type, borough, status, description). The observation already resolves to its own registry record; no different registry record refers to the same real-world project.

decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id 'project_fordham-road-sbs-2010-01-14' already exists in the registry with a matching payload (same project_name, project_type, borough, description). The observation already resolves to its own registry record; no different registry record refers to the same real-world project. The registry record 'project_fordham-road-transit-improvements-bronx' is a distinct study project on the same corridor but is not the same thing.

The observation's base_record_id 'project_34th-street-enhanced-bus-priority' already exists in the registry (source_ids include both '2010_01_14_brt_1st2nd_cac3' and 'better_buses'). Same project_name and project_type. The observation already resolves to its own registry record; no different registry record refers to the same real-world project. Other 34th Street registry records (34th-st-sbs-2012, 34th-street-bus-priority, 34th-street-busway, 34th-street-transitway-concept) all have different project types, names, or statuses.
